note: Australian-produced. Grounded in the course's own modules. Founder to review before wiring live.

quizzes.title: CARSI Fire & Smoke Restoration Practitioner — Knowledge Check

questions.questionText: Dry (protein/paper) smoke residue is generally cleaned with…
options: Dry methods first (vacuum, dry sponge) before wet cleaning

questions.questionText: Acidic soot on metals and electronics is urgent because it…
options: Corrodes surfaces quickly, so early action limits damage
Removing the source of the odour before treating the air

questions.questionText: The building's HVAC system in a fire is important because it…
options: Can spread smoke and soot through the whole structure
Should be run at full to clear smoke

questions.questionText: PPE on a fire job protects primarily against…
Cleaning method is selected mainly by…
options: The smoke residue type on each surface
